final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit DRAM cell with a single bit of data storage. It has inputs clk, we, din, and dout. When we is high, data from din is written to the cell on the falling edge of clk. When we is low, dout reflects the stored data.
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [3:0] din,
    output reg [3:0] dout
);
    reg [3:0] storage; // internal storage for the DRAM cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            storage <= din; // write data to storage
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        dout = storage; // output the stored data
    end
endmodule
